title: Hawking and peddling to be regulated by police jury
doc_html:
PART IV.  HAWKERS AND PEDDLERS

§4831.  Hawking and peddling to be regulated by police jury

All police juries may pass ordinances regulating and defining hawking and peddling.  Police juries may enforce these ordinances by fine or imprisonment.
doc_text:
PART IV.  HAWKERS AND PEDDLERS
§4831.  Hawking and peddling to be regulated by police jury
All police juries may pass ordinances regulating and defining hawking and peddling.  Police juries may enforce these ordinances by fine or imprisonment.
